Xbox Live Functions

The Xbox Live functions are divided into the following categories:

  • Arbitration Functions
  • Competition Functions
  • Content Download Functions
  • Friends Functions
  • Game Functions
  • Logon Functions
  • Matchmaking Functions
  • Messaging Functions
  • Miscellaneous Functions
  • Mutelist Functions
  • Notification Functions
  • Presence Functions
  • Query Functions
  • Signature Functions
  • Statistics Functions
  • Storage Functions
  • Task Functions
  • Team Functions
  • TitleID Functions
